name: Cash Store
description_short: Cash Store Helotes, Texas — Cash Store offers in-store installment loans with same-day funding for borrowers with bad or no credit, accepting Matricula ...
description_long:
Cash Store is a brick-and-mortar alternative lending chain with locations across Texas and other states. The Houston location at 19734 Tomball Pkwy serves customers seeking fast access to cash outside traditional bank channels. The company markets itself as accessible to borrowers who may be turned away by conventional lenders, including those with bad or no credit history. With a 4.9-star rating across 208 Google reviews, the individual branch has built a strong local reputation for friendly, efficient service.

Cash Store's primary product is the unsecured installment loan — a fixed-schedule repayment loan the company describes as suitable for major purchases, bill consolidation, or unexpected large expenses. The application process begins with an online pre-qualification form, but completion requires an in-store visit to submit documents and go through underwriting. Funding is typically same-day after approval. The company also offers the Netspend Prepaid Mastercard, a reloadable card that functions like a debit card for customers without traditional bank relationships. Existing customers can refinance or re-loan by calling the store directly, bypassing a full in-store visit.

Cash Store stands out for its acceptance of the Matricula Consular card — a Mexican consular ID — as a valid form of identification, making its loans accessible to immigrant borrowers who lack U.S. government-issued ID. The online pre-qualification step lets applicants check eligibility before traveling to a branch. Branch hours (Monday–Friday 10am–6pm, Saturday 10am–2pm) are limited compared to online lenders, but the in-person model has generated consistent praise for staff who explain loan terms clearly and process applications quickly.

Cash Store fills a genuine gap for borrowers who need fast cash and cannot qualify at banks or credit unions. However, no APR ranges or fee schedules are disclosed on the website — a significant transparency gap for a category where rates from similar lenders routinely exceed 100% APR. Borrowers should request the full cost of borrowing in writing before signing any loan agreement. The requirement for an active checking account (open at least 30 days) also excludes fully unbanked applicants despite the company's otherwise inclusive ID policy.
pros: Same-day funding typically available after in-store approval
Accepts Matricula Consular card as valid ID — accessible to immigrant borrowers
Online pre-qualification lets applicants check eligibility before visiting a branch
Considers applicants with bad or no credit history
Existing customers can refinance or re-loan by phone without a full in-store visit
4.9/5 Google rating across 208 reviews at this Houston branch
Netspend Prepaid Mastercard available for customers without traditional debit access
cons: No APR, fee, or loan amount ranges disclosed anywhere on the website
Application must be completed in-store — not a fully online lender
Requires an active checking account open at least 30 days, excluding the fully unbanked
Limited branch hours (closes 6pm weekdays, 2pm Saturday, closed Sunday)
Loans from Cash Store and similar installment lenders typically carry very high interest rates
best_for: Borrowers with bad or no credit who need cash quickly
Immigrant borrowers who hold a Matricula Consular card as their primary ID
Existing Cash Store customers looking to refinance or take a second loan
Consumers who want to pre-qualify online before committing to an in-store visit
diagnosis: Cash Store is best for credit-challenged borrowers — including immigrants with Matricula Consular IDs — who need same-day cash and live near a branch location. The main caveat is that APRs are never disclosed on the website, and installment loans from this class of lender typically carry very high rates; borrowers should compare the full cost of borrowing before signing.
services: Retail remote refinancing (by phone for existing customers)
Retail remote reloans (by phone for existing customers)
